accounts.title: Linked accounts
accounts.desc: Add multiple League of Legends accounts to track games across all of them.
accounts.addDesc: Enter the Riot ID and region of the account to add.
accounts.errorMain: This account is already your main account.

profileStep.title: How do you want to be called?
profileStep.subtitle: Choose a name to display throughout the app. This can be a nickname, your main alias — anything you like.
profileStep.label: Display name

riotConnect.title: Connect Your Riot Account
riotConnect.subtitle: Enter your Riot Games ID to link your account and fetch your match history.

toast.successDesc: Welcome to NexusMind. Let's start improving.

assessment.title: Reassessment
assessment.subtitle: Rate your current skill level across all fundamentals. This updates your progress charts and objective suggestions.
assessment.rankNote: This does not reflect your level the way a rank does — it is precisely meant to position you relative to your current rank, and identify which fundamental concepts are your strengths and weaknesses at this point in your development.

reassessmentBanner.title: Time for your periodic assessment
reassessmentBanner.desc: Update your skill ratings to keep your coaching data accurate.

noSession.title: Start a Session
noSession.desc: Set an objective and start tracking your improvement.

sessionProgress.title: Session objective progress
sessionProgress.noData: Play games and complete reviews to see your objective progression

statDiffs.title: Biggest stat changes
statDiffs.noData: Need at least 2 snapshots — compute averages to track progression

session.activeLock: Your session is locked. Focus on your objective.
session.chooseDesc: Choose 1 to 3 objectives to focus on. The review form will show KPIs for all selected objectives.
session.chooseFull: Pick 1 to 3 fundamentals to work on during this session. The post-game review will display KPIs for each selected objective.
session.fundamentalPlaceholder: Select a fundamental to work on
session.notePlaceholder:
Concrete explanation of the objective;
e.g: die less to ganks and be more aggressive in lane.

sessionType.title: Session type
sessionType.liveDesc: Games you're about to play — session stays active until you end it.
sessionType.retroactiveDesc: You already played these games — add them from your history to review them.

toast.endedDesc: Check Analytics to see your progress.

endDialog.title: Session Conclusion
endDialog.subtitle: How did it go? Write your takeaways, progress and any patterns you noticed.
endDialog.placeholder: E.g.: I died less to ganks but was too passive when ahead. Wave control objective was respected, trading still inconsistent.

kpiSelection.title: KPIs to track
kpiSelection.desc: Select which KPIs you want to rate during each review. All are selected by default.

queueFilter.title: Queue filter
queueFilter.desc: Only import and show games from the selected queue(s).

gamesList.title: Games in this session
gamesList.noGames: No games yet. Import from your match history below.

noSession.title: No Active Session
noSession.desc: Start a session first to review games.

waiting.title: Waiting for your next game to end...
waiting.desc: The review page will open automatically when your game ends.
waiting.orImport: Or import games you already played from your Riot match history:

review.title: Post-Game Review

freeText.label: Thoughts & Feelings
freeText.placeholder: How did the game feel overall? Any insights?

review.objectiveQuestion: Did you respect your session objective this game?

autoScoring.title: Automatic KPI scoring
autoScoring.desc: Enable automatic scoring for KPIs that can be inferred reliably from match stats and timeline rules. KPIs without a measurable correlation stay manual.
autoScoring.coverage: {{auto}} auto-filled KPI(s), {{manual}} manual KPI(s) still to rate
autoScoring.error: Auto-scoring failed — match data may not be cached yet. Scores are manual.

bias.bannerDesc: Some high KPI scores look inconsistent with what happened in this match. Review the highlighted objective sections before saving.
bias.generic: One of your ratings looks optimistic compared with the match data.

rules.earlyJungleGankDeaths: You rated this objective highly, but you died {{count}} time(s) to enemy-jungler-involved lane ganks before 15 minutes.
rules.lowVisionActivity: You rated this objective highly, but this game had only {{wards}} wards placed and {{control}} control wards bought.
rules.lowCsPerMin: You rated this objective highly, but your CS/min was {{actual}} while the expected benchmark was about {{expected}}.
rules.losingLaningState: You rated this objective highly, but your lane state was poor at 15 minutes (gold diff {{goldDiff}}, CS diff {{csDiff}}).
rules.lowVisionControl: You rated this objective highly, but your vision control was weak this game ({{vsPerMin}} vision score/min, {{wardsDestroyed}} wards cleared).
rules.lowSupportVision: You rated this objective highly, but your support-style vision impact was low this game ({{vsPerMin}} vision score/min, {{control}} control wards bought).
rules.lowSkillshotDodging: You rated this objective highly, but you dodged few skillshots ({{dodged}} tracked) while dying {{deaths}} times.
rules.highDeathsLowValue: You rated this objective highly, but you died {{deaths}} times with only {{soloKills}} solo kill(s), suggesting poor fight selection or limit judgment.
rules.lowRoamPresence: You rated this objective highly, but your roam influence looked limited this game (kill participation {{kp}}%).
rules.lowJungleInfluence: You rated this objective highly, but your jungle impact looked low this game (kill participation {{kp}}%, objective damage share {{epic}}%).
rules.lowObjectiveImpact: You rated this objective highly, but your macro impact on objectives and structures was low (objective damage {{objectives}}, building damage {{buildings}}).
rules.lowStructurePressure: You rated this objective highly, but your structure pressure was low this game (building damage {{buildings}}).
rules.lowCarryOutput: You rated this objective highly, but your carry output was low relative to the game state (team damage share {{dmg}}%, deaths {{deaths}}).
rules.lowTeamfightPresence: You rated this objective highly, but your teamfight presence looked low this game (kill participation {{kp}}%).
rules.lowTempoEfficiency: You rated this objective highly, but your tempo conversion looked weak (CS/min {{cs}}, objective damage {{objective}}, building damage {{building}}).
rules.highDangerZoneTime: You rated this objective highly, but you spent {{pct}}% of your laning phase in the danger zone and died {{deaths}} time(s) before 15 minutes.
rules.deathsInDangerZone: You rated this objective highly, but {{danger}} of your {{total}} early deaths happened in the danger zone (near enemy tower).
rules.missedTradeWindows: You rated this objective highly, but you only traded in {{taken}} out of {{taken}}+{{missed}} windows when your opponent was CSing near you ({{ratio}}% conversion).
rules.highDangerZoneTrading: You rated this objective highly, but {{pct}}% of your laning damage came from the danger zone and you died {{deaths}} time(s) there — suggesting overaggressive positioning.
rules.jungleDangerQuadrantDeaths: You rated this objective highly, but you died {{deaths}} time(s) in enemy-priority jungle quadrants before 15 minutes.

toast.reviewLaterTitle: Game moved to To Be Reviewed

charts.noGames: No games recorded yet. Start a session and play!
charts.noStats: No statistics available yet. Play some games and review them!

history.title: History
history.subtitle: Browse your match history and coaching sessions
history.empty: No sessions yet. Create your first session to start tracking.

gamesTab.empty: No recent games found. Play some games to see your history.

history.noGames: No games recorded in this session yet.

picker.title: Import games from Riot history
picker.subtitle: Select games to add to the current session

statsAvg.title: 20-Game Averages
statsAvg.subtitle: Average performance across your last 20 games — save a snapshot to track progression over time
statsAvg.empty: No snapshots yet. Click "Compute & Save" to generate your first 20-game average.
statsAvg.noProgressionData: Need at least 2 snapshots to compare progression. Play 20+ games then come back here.

detailedStats.pageSubtitle: Select a game to view in-depth performance breakdown
detailedStats.noData: No stats available for this game.
detailedStats.noGames: No recent games found. Play some games to see stats.

diffLegend.title: Color legend
diffLegend.note: Laning diffs compare your stats to your direct lane opponent at 15 minutes.

laning.title: Laning Phase (@15 min)
laning.shortGame: Game ended before 15 minutes — laning stats unavailable.

badges.improvement_1_desc: Improve a fundamental score by 1+ point

streak.noStreak: Start a streak by reviewing games daily

rankMilestone.positive: Congratulations on ranking up! Your hard work is paying off.
rankMilestone.negative: Don't worry — focus on your fundamentals. The rank will follow.

suggestion.title: AI Coach Suggestion
suggestion.hint: Not sure what to focus on? Let the AI analyze your assessment scores.
suggestion.error: Failed to get AI suggestion. Check your OpenAI API key.

kpi.title: KPI Scores
kpi.subtitle: Rate your performance on each aspect of your objective this game
kpi.noKpis: No KPIs defined for this objective.

timeline.title: Timeline Notes
timeline.subtitle: Note key moments related to your objective — use the game timestamp
timeline.guideTitle: How to write good timeline notes:
timeline.guideText: Focus on decisions you made related to your session objective. What went right? What went wrong?
timeline.notePlaceholder: What happened at this moment? What decision did you make?

fundamentalsGrid.title: Skills Assessment
fundamentalsGrid.subtitle: Rate yourself honestly on each fundamental (1-10). This helps track your progress.

charts.noProgress: Complete assessments to see your progress over time

update.availableDesc: A new version is being downloaded in the background.
update.readyDesc: Restart the app to apply the update.

toast.simDesc: A fake game was added to your session. Review page will open.
